title: CAD Export - SCRPA

ReportNumberNew.description: CAD report identifier (primary key / join key to RMS Case Number).
x_derivation_logic: `YY` = last two digits of the **year the report was created**
`NNNNNN` = sequential number starting at `000001` on January 01 each year
**Supplementals**: same base number, with a suffix letter starting at `A` (then `B`, `C`, …)
Must not be parsed as numeric (keep as text to preserve leading zeros).
x_validation_rules: Must not be parsed as numeric (keep as text to preserve leading zeros).

Incident.description: Incident type descriptor (typically a code + description).

HowReported.description: Method by which the call/incident was reported/initiated.
x_raw_allowed_values: `9-1-1` **must be kept as text** and must not be displayed/parsed as a date (e.g., Excel auto-formatting).

x_validation_rules: Must contain at least one comma.
May be null (missing observed in sample).
If present, should match a controlled list of known grid codes (to be defined from GIS/grid reference).

x_derivation_logic: Must equal the year portion of `TimeofCall`.
x_validation_rules: Must equal the year portion of `TimeofCall`.

Officer.description: Officer identifier for the call (primary/assigned officer).
x_validation_rules: Should match a standardized officer naming/badge convention (recommend aligning to `CAD/SCRPA/Assignment_Master_V2.csv` standardization outputs).

Disposition.description: Disposition / outcome code or label for the CAD call.
x_validation_rules: Must be limited to a controlled domain (to be defined once the value list is extracted from the export).

x_notes: source_field_name is the raw CAD export header (exact spelling, including spaces/punctuation).
field_name is the canonical/internal name used by the ESRI deploy flow in this repo (notably TimeOfCall / Response_Type / Hour).
esri_field_name is the ESRI deploy export name (same as field_name for deploy-schema fields).
If a field is not present in the ESRI deploy required schema, esri_field_name is null.
